overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 featuring an Ultramarine in blue power armor traversing a Tyranid-infested alien jungle. The character moves through dense biomass, explores a crashed Imperial ship, navigates narrow passages, and engages in intense melee combat with Tyranid swarms.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien jungle path with Tyranid biomass infestation

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through dense alien jungle toward a crashed Imperial structure in the distance

entered.detail: large fleshy red and purple organic growths covering the ground and rocks
dense alien tree cover blocking most of the sky
large blue and grey Imperial spacecraft wreckage partially buried in the jungle
ancient stone wall covered in biomass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense alien jungle with heavy Tyranid biomass covering the terrain. The Space Marine moves forward along a dirt path toward a crashed Imperial ship visible in the distance, with thick canopy overhead creating a gloomy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded crash site with Imperial wreckage

events.description: character picks up a chainsword weapon from the ground near the wreckage

agents.ego_description: wading through murky water surrounding the crashed ship and acquiring a chainsword melee weapon

entered.detail: murky brown water covering the ground around the crash site
stone steps leading up the side of the wreckage
melee weapon with glowing teeth lying on the ground for pickup
dark rocky canyon entrance leading away from the crash site
tall rocky walls forming a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a flooded area surrounding the crashed Imperial ship, wading through murky water. After picking up a chainsword weapon, the character approaches a narrow rocky canyon passage, leaving the dense jungle biomass behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage leading to open swamp

events.description: character uses smoke dash ability to quickly traverse a section of the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: sprinting through a narrow rocky canyon and using a smoke dash ability to navigate the terrain

entered.detail: large stone archway and bridge structure spanning the swamp ahead
open marshy ground with shallow water and scattered vegetation
alien plants and trees lining the edges of the swamp

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow enclosed canyon with rock walls on both sides, using a smoke dash ability to traverse quickly. The passage opens up to reveal a stone bridge arch in the distance and swampy terrain ahead, transitioning from enclosed to open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp combat arena with stone ruins

events.description: character engages Tyranid swarm with chainsword melee attacks
character switches to ranged bolter fire while dodging enemy attacks

agents.ego_description: fighting multiple Tyranid creatures using chainsword melee attacks and bolter ranged fire, executing dodges and combos

notable_agents.action: Tyranid warrior leaping toward the character to attack with claws
smaller Tyranid creatures swarming from the left flank

entered.detail: open area with blood-stained ground where combat takes place
ancient stone columns supporting the bridge structure
distant ruined structures and walls framing the combat arena
large twisted rock outcroppings with biomass

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open swamp clearing and immediately engages a dense swarm of Tyranid enemies. Using the newly acquired chainsword and ranged bolter fire, the character fights off leaping warriors and swarming creatures amidst stone ruins and blood-splattered ground, with the stone bridge arch visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gloomy, biomass-choked jungle into a wide, blood-splattered swamp clearing. It begins with a Space Marine advancing along a dirt path under a thick canopy toward the silhouette of a crashed Imperial ship. As the character wades through murky floodwaters and acquires a chainsword, the dense jungle biomass gives way to a narrow, enclosed rocky canyon. The scene then shifts as the character uses a smoke dash to traverse the canyon, eventually emerging from the tight rock walls toward a distant stone bridge arch. Finally, the environment opens into a swampy clearing where the camera captures an intense battle against a swarming Tyranid horde amidst ancient stone ruins.
